scenes.narration: God asked Jonah to go to a city called Nineveh. But Jonah said no. He ran the other direction.
scenes.image_prompt: Young man Jonah running away from a glowing light, boarding a wooden sailing ship at a busy harbor, bright colorful bible storybook illustration, warm sunny day

scenes.narration: Jonah jumped on a ship and sailed far away. But you can't hide from God.
scenes.image_prompt: Wooden sailing ship on calm blue ocean, Jonah sitting below deck looking worried, bright colorful children's bible illustration, peaceful but tense mood

scenes.narration: A massive storm hit. The waves grew tall as mountains. The sailors were terrified.
scenes.image_prompt: Dramatic storm at sea, huge dark waves crashing over a wooden ship, lightning in the sky, sailors holding on for dear life, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Jonah knew the storm was his fault. He told the sailors to throw him into the sea. And they did.
scenes.image_prompt: Jonah leaping into the stormy dark ocean from the ship, sailors watching with wide eyes, dramatic colorful bible storybook art, storm beginning to calm

scenes.narration: Immediately... the storm stopped. And then something enormous came from the deep.
scenes.image_prompt: Massive great whale rising from the calm ocean at night, moonlight reflecting on the water, sailors on the ship pointing in amazement, bright colorful storybook illustration

scenes.narration: A giant whale swallowed Jonah whole. He sat in the belly of that whale for three days and three nights.
scenes.image_prompt: Inside a giant whale belly, Jonah sitting cross-legged in a warm glowing space, looking thoughtful and humbled, colorful whimsical bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: In the dark, Jonah prayed. He told God he was sorry. And God heard every word.
scenes.image_prompt: Jonah kneeling and praying inside the whale belly, warm golden light surrounding him, peaceful expression, bright colorful children's bible illustration

scenes.narration: The whale swam to shore... and spit Jonah out onto dry land.
scenes.image_prompt: Giant whale on a sandy beach, Jonah tumbling out onto the shore, sun rising behind him, bright cheerful colorful bible storybook art, joyful scene

scenes.narration: Jonah went to Nineveh. He delivered the message. And the entire city listened and changed.
scenes.image_prompt: Jonah standing and speaking boldly in the center of a large colorful city, crowds of people listening and bowing their heads, warm golden light, bright storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Running from God never works. But coming back to Him always does.
scenes.image_prompt: Jonah standing on a hilltop looking out at the peaceful city below, warm sunset sky, God's golden light shining down, hopeful and peaceful bible storybook art
